name: Meat and Cabbage (Old German Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the hamburger mixture with salt and pepper.
2. Add the egg and mix well.
3. Mix in the rice.
4. To make the sauce, melt butter in a pan. Add tomato soup and an equal amount of water. Add the onion, parsley, celery, lemon juice, sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes.
5. Wash cabbage leaves and boil until tender.
6. Place 2 Tbsp of meat mixture in each leaf. Roll tightly and secure with a toothpick.
7. Place rolls in a saucepan and pour the sauce over them.
8. Cover pan tightly and cook slowly for 3 hours.
9. Serve very hot.
